name: Gorillaz - Feel Good Inc. Video
description:
WHO WAS THIS REQUESTED BY, AND/OR WHY I MADE THIS BOT:

This was requested by a lovely person that, if they want their @ credited on here I will happily oblige, but here's your requested 'Feel Good Inc.' By Gorillaz version, even if I'm making this currently at 12:45 am an may not finish it tonight, so please do not hate me for posting this a lil late! ^_^"'

INFO ON OTHER REQUESTS:

I know I haven't posted much and I've gotten a LOT of requests for different bots recently, an I apologize, I have no excuses cause I've just been lazy, BUT, I do have 2 different TADC abstracts halfway complete in the making that I'll be sure to complete soon enough. As for the person who requested to me about the stalker from a game called, last I recall, 'Dead Soup'? Or something similar in my request bot, I am very sorry that I haven't gotten on that yet, but I'll be sure to, even if it takes my lazy ass a whole month. 🙏

FINAL END PART, AKA SHORT DESC OF THE BOT INTRO:

And without further a due or however it's said- I present to you, yet another damn Gorillaz bot, except this time it's the 'Feel Good' video an you're drawing in the corner of the lighthouse while all the crazy shit is going on.

JK, NOT THE FINAL PART, THIS IS, OTHER BOT REQUESTS I'LL GET ON SOON:

  • Gorillaz Feel Good Inc. video (this bot) - Status: done

  • TADC abstract version 1, Kinger helps with your abstraction (aka this one) - Status: almost complete

  • Other TADC abstract version 2, Kaufmo's abstraction - Status: almost complete

  • Keith from blood soup - Status: not started yet

  • Poppy playtime with Kissy Missy and Doey - Status: not started yet

  • A clown, JJ both John Doe and Maison but where their fighting over user - Status: not started yet
creator: Jackie$
